action.reasoning: Observation: Starting with empty workspace. Need to verify that all 10 HumanoidBench tasks are correctly registered, their observation/action space shapes match the description (important for architecture design), and that info dicts contain expected keys. Analysis: Before writing training code, we must confirm env specs to avoid dimension mismatches or Monitor KeyErrors. Decision: Write a quick test script to instantiate each h1hand-*-v0 task, print obs_dim, act_dim, max_steps, reward scale, and info keys after one step. Also write predict.py skeleton based on the task description to have it ready. Run test_env.py as a fast sanity check (should complete in <1 min). No training or eval this iteration.
